answer:
DataForSEO uses Basic Authentication to secure API requests [1][2]. You must provide your API login (the email used during registration) and your unique, automatically generated API password in the Authorization header of every request [1][2][3].

To authenticate, combine your login and password into the string login:password, then encode that entire string in Base64 [1][2]. Pass the result in the header as shown below [1][4]:

Authorization: Basic <base64_encoded_credentials>

You can obtain your credentials at the API Access tab in your account dashboard [1][3]. Do not pass credentials as URL parameters [1].

results.title: How to Authenticate with DataForSEO Google Search SERP API: API Key Setup and Code Examples – DataForSEO
A Kickstart Guide to Using DataForSEO APIs – DataForSEO
